class.name: AutoworkCollector
class.experimental: Some methods may not be implemented and may be changed in future versions.
class.brief_description: Collects and manages test scripts for execution.
class.description:
The AutoworkCollector is responsible for discovering, registering, and storing test scripts used by the Autowork framework.
It supports both manual registration of scripts and automatic discovery by scanning directories. The collector does not execute tests itself, but instead provides a centralized list of scripts that contain test definitions.

method.name: add_script
method.description: Adds a script to the collection. The script at [param path] is registered as a potential source of test cases.

method.name: get_scripts
method.description: Returns an [Array] containing all collected script paths.

method.name: process_directory
method.description: Searches the directory at [param path] for test scripts and adds them to the collection.
